message:
Round 20: BPE algorithm investigation (heap encoder failed)

Attempted: Priority queue-based merge (port of rs-bpe)
Result: 2% SLOWER (450ms vs 447.6ms)

Why it failed:
- Priority queue overhead > backtracking cost
- Our backtracking already highly optimized
- Algorithm change not the answer

REAL bottleneck identified:
- HashMap lookups in isValidTokenPairImpl() (50-60% of time)
- split_table.get() HashMap access (20-30% of time)
- Should be array access like rs-bpe!

rs-bpe uses:
  split_table: Vec<(u32, u32)>  // Array, O(1)

PyAOT uses:
  split_table: HashMap(u32, Pair)  // HashMap, slower

Expected gain from HashMap → Array: 20-40% (the winning move!)

Next: Round 21 - Implement array-based split_table
